mapper.update: CREATE TABLE USER_TOTP ( USER_ID INT NOT NULL, SECRET VARCHAR(512) NOT NULL, ENROLLED_AT DATETIME, LAST_USED_STEP BIGINT DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT PK_USER_TOTP PRIMARY KEY (USER_ID) )
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID FROM USER_TOTP ORDER BY USER_ID
SELECT SECRET, LAST_USED_STEP FROM USER_TOTP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_TOTP (USER_ID, SECRET, ENROLLED_AT, LAST_USED_STEP) VALUES (#{userId}, #{secret}, #{enrolledAt}, #{lastUsedStep})
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_TOTP SET LAST_USED_STEP = #{lastUsedStep} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
